steps.title: Recognize the definition
steps.content: The phrase after the blank explains what 'cognate replacement' means: the rate at which a word is replaced over time with a noncognate form. The transition must signal clarification or restatement.

steps.title: Remove unrelated signals
steps.content: Choice A signals similarity between separate ideas. Choice C introduces an example, but the phrase after the blank defines a term. Choice D adds another point, but this phrase clarifies the same point. The answer is B.
